choose.otherwise: AND ( TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%') OR CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%') )

mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(IDX),0)+1 IDX FROM t_board
/** 통합게시판 등록 */ INSERT INTO t_board (IDX,P_IDX,BOARD_TYPE,TITLE,CONTENT,HIT,REG_ID,REG_NM,REG_DTIME,MOD_ID,MOD_NM,MOD_DTIME,G_IDX,G_ORD,G_LVL,STATUS,CATE,FILE_TYPE_GB,NOTICE_YN,TMP01) VALUES (#{idx},#{pIdx},#{boardType},#{title},#{content},#{hit},#{regId},#{regNm},#{regDtime},#{modId},#{modNm},#{modDtime},#{idx},#{gOrd},#{gLvl},#{status},#{cate},#{fileTypeGb},#{noticeYn},#{tmp01})
mapper.select:
select a.* ,(SELECT user_nm from t_user_info where user_id = a.reg_id) REG_NM2 from t_board a where a.notice_yn = 'Y'
order by a.reg_dtime desc
